TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bob_Brown, title = Bob_Brown, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bob_Brown} }

S.FORM: Bob Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Bob Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players qyanux na sraral Bob Brown byaqan na ryax maki Oberon, New South Wales. trang mqwas biru ga galan nha mqbaq biru mrhuw. tmasot mqwas biru musa hopa pqwasan biru. 1972 kawas wal maki Tasmania la. suruw pincwagan nya ga hopa na pkita nbu sinsiy beh Launceston. sangka' mtasiq na sinqqas mruw msqun mlahang cinbwanan.

Bob Brown sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 12 nqu tay 11, Bob Brown, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 2016) pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players qyanux na sraral Bob Brown byaqan na ryax maki Oberon, New South Wales. trang mqwas biru ga galan nha mqbaq biru mrhuw. tmasot mqwas biru musa hopa pqwasan biru. 1972 kawas wal maki Tasmania la. suruw pincwagan nya ga hopa na pkita nbu sinsiy beh Launceston. sangka' mtasiq na sinqqas mruw msqun mlahang cinbwanan.

(mńßuqil s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē qjanux na s~…ēraral ő≤oő≤ ő≤rown ő≤jaqan na rjax maki oő≤eron, new s~…ēoutńß wales~…ē. traŇč mqwas~…ē ő≤iru …£a …£alan nńßa mqő≤aq ő≤iru mrńßuw. tmas~…ēot mqwas~…ē ő≤iru mus~…ēa ńßopa pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. **** kawas~…ē wal maki tas~…ēmania la. s~…ēuruw pin ¶~ ®wa…£an nja …£a ńßopa na pkita nő≤u s~…ēins~…ēij ő≤eńß laun ¶~ ®es~…ēton. s~…ēaŇčka Ē mtas~…ēiq na s~…ēinqqas~…ē mruw ms~…ēqun mlańßaŇč ¶~ ®inő≤wanan.
